title: Structure SvelteKit routing and data loading
description: Decide per route which data is server-only vs universal and place load logic accordingly.
body: Steps: 1. Map the route tree (+page, +layout) and identify shared vs page-specific data. 2. For data needing secrets or a database, use +page.server.js/+layout.server.js. 3. For data safe on both sides, use +page.js with the injected fetch. 4. Hoist data shared by children into a +layout load and let pages read it. 5. Confirm each load returns serializable data and handles the error/redirect helpers. Rollback point: before moving logic between server and universal loads. Validation: the page renders server-side with its data and no secret appears in the client payload.
